sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, value String);
SELECT id, lower(value) AS lowercase_value FROM test_strings WHERE lower(value) = lower('CLICKHOUSE') OR lower(value) IS NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE lower(value) = (SELECT lower(value) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2);
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num_id Int32, num_value Float32);
SELECT num_id FROM test_numbers WHERE (num_value = -1.0 AND lower(CAST(num_value AS String)) = lower('-1')) OR num_value IS NULL;
SELECT id, lower(value) AS lowercase_value FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (SELECT num_id FROM test_numbers WHERE num_value < 0);
SELECT id, lower(value) FROM test_strings GROUP BY id, lower(value) HAVING lower(value) != '';
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_numbers WHERE num_value = 10.5 AND lower(value) = lower('CLICKHOUSE')) AND lower(value) IS NOT NULL;
